name: Veggie Dog Original Adult 10kg
shortDescription: Gluten-free complete food with red lentils for sensitive adult dogs
description: Veggie Dog Origin is a 100% vegetarian and 99.99% vegan complete food designed to keep your adult dog thriving while caring for the planet. This gluten-free recipe uses high-quality plant proteins like red lentils (10%) to provide essential amino acids for strong muscles and overall vitality. Enriched with taurine and L-carnitine for heart health and powerful antioxidants to combat cell aging, it ensures your canine companion enjoys a long, active life. Nutritional Benefits . Complete and balanced for adult dogs . Promotes healthy weight and vitality . Supports skin and coat health with plant-based oils . Environmentally responsible dog nutrition Nutritional Analysis (per 100g) Nutrient Value Protein ~22% Fat ~10% Crude Fiber ~2.5% Crude Ash ~7% Moisture ~10% *Approximate values Why Choose Veggie Dog Origin? 100% Vegetarian & 99.99% Vegan – Contains only plant-based ingredients, with 0.01% vitamin D3 from wool fat. Sustainable & Eco-Friendly – Help reduce your dog’s carbon pawprint with every meal. Gentle on Digestion – A gluten-free formula ideal for sensitive stomachs. Heart-Supportive Nutrients – Taurine and L-carnitine promote strong cardiovascular health. Antioxidant-Rich – Protects cells from aging and supports overall immunity.
